text: YMCA OF GRANTS PASS SUMMER DAY CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides youth camps. 1000 Redwood Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Most activities are for children ages 3-12 Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-9pm, Saturday 8am-5pm Email (541) 474-0001 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 474-0001 Main phone Main phone (541) 474-0001 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to scheulde an appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Income verification if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: Josephine and Western Jackson Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5am-8pm, Saturday 8am-5pm Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
